svg.title: OP_VAULT — Taproot Tree Surgery
svg.desc: A tree diagram representing the taproot UTXO. OP_VAULT surgically prunes the vault-spend branch and grafts a CTV-locked replacement, while the recovery branch remains untouched. Three keys form roots at different depths: trigger (hot/shallow), recoveryauth (warm/medium), recovery destination (cold/deep).

g.aria-label: Vault spending leaf — surgically replaced by OP_VAULT
Recovery leaf — cold sweep path, always preserved through surgery
CTV-locked withdrawal leaf — replaces vault leaf with hash commitment
Time delay — spend_delay blocks before withdrawal completes
Withdrawal — funds arrive at chosen destination after time delay
Trigger key — hot key that signs the trigger transaction
Recoveryauth key — warm key that authorizes recovery transactions
Recovery destination — cold consensus-locked address, immutable
